understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to maneuver any pushable object—either the currently selected controllable piece or any block—to reach or exceed the target_x coordinate specified in level.target_x, winning by achieving this before exhausting the step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece exactly one STEP (3 pixels) in the chosen direction; if a pushable object (block or another controllable) is adjacent in that direction, it gets pushed along simultaneously. Walls and boundaries block direct movement or pushes, with some potentially behaving differently for direct contact versus pushed objects, requiring trial to discern exact rules. SELECT action switches control to another object by its id.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | No blocks detected and all directions unblocked; move selected piece right from x=0 toward target_x=6 (two steps of 3 pixels each will reach exactly 6).
history.reasoning: No blocks detected and all directions unblocked; move selected piece right from x=0 toward target_x=6 (two steps of 3 pixels each will reach exactly 6).
